title: MicroStrategy announces capital allocation strategy: buyback plus alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin
MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
MicroStrategy closes $650M convertible note offering and intends to invest proceeds in Bitcoin
MicroStrategy buys an additional 19,452 bitcoins for $1.026B after issuing more convertible debt
MacroStrategy closes $205M Bitcoin-collateralized Silvergate loan to acquire additional Bitcoin
